use_cases: Displaying time-series data trends over a period of days
Visualizing metric changes like Mean Time to Respond
Building monitoring dashboards for performance tracking
Showing data comparisons across multiple time intervals
Creating interactive data reports for business analytics
ai_summary: Reaviz Area Chart component for rendering time-series data visualization with customizable gradient fills. Supports metric cards with icons for displaying KPIs alongside chart trends. Uses linear axes with tick labels and gridlines for data clarity.
